Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Mark Epstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ORIANA HARRISON.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) MORRIS CANNON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Plaintiff Oriana Harrison sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $48,800.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $11,637.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $600.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $61,037.00
Judgment signed in open court.
